help_main: 📖 Bot Help Welcome to our Hentai Gacha! Here you can collect unique cards, earn points, and compete with friends. Main commands: /roll — get a new card /profile — your inventory and balance /top — global leaderboards /duel @user bet — challenge to a duel /craft — smelt duplicates /link - get a code to link your Discord account Choose a section below to learn more.
help_cards: 🎴 How do cards work? Once every 3 hours you can use /roll. The bot gives a random card and 🪙 Points. 🌟 Fragments: Mythical cards drop as Fragments. Collect 10 to get a whole card in your inventory!
help_rarities: ✨ Card Rarities ⚪️ Common └ Drop: 60% | 10 🪙 🟢 Uncommon └ Drop: 20% | 25 🪙 🔵 Rare └ Drop: 15% | 50 🪙 🟣 Epic └ Drop: 4% | 75 🪙 🟡 Legendary └ Drop: 0.99% | 100 🪙 🔴 Mythic └ Drop: 0.01% | 500 🪙 Higher rarity means higher Power for duels!
help_streaks: 🔥 Streaks Log in every day and use /roll. Your Streak grows daily, increasing bonus 🪙 Points for each roll. ⚠️ If you miss a day, the streak resets.
help_pity: 🛡 Pity System Protects from bad luck. If a rarity doesn't drop for a while, it is guaranteed with a 100% chance on a specific roll: 🔵 Rare — on 6th 🟣 Epic — on 18th 🟡 Legendary — on 40th 🔴 Mythical (shard) — at 80th When a rarity drops, its counter resets.
help_duel: ⚔️ Point Duels Use command: /duel @username bet How it works: 1. The bot selects one random card from each player's inventory. 2. Win chance depends on the Power of the selected cards (higher rarity = higher power). 3. The winner takes the loser's bet.
help_craft: ⚒ Duplicate Crafting Don't know what to do with extra copies? Use command: /craft Crafting Prices: • 5 duplicates of one rarity = 1 random card of the next rarity. • 15 Legendary duplicates = 1 Mythical card fragment. ⚠️ Important: - The bot automatically uses the cheapest available duplicates. - The original card (1 copy) always stays with you; only extra copies are burned. - Mythical cards cannot be dismantled.
suggest_err_funds: You need more than 1000 points to suggest a card!
suggest_rules: Suggestion Rules: 💰 Choose wisely, as this service costs 1,000 points (deducted upon successful submission). 🔄 You can suggest new cards as well as replacements for current ones if you found a better art! ⛔️ Jokes, off-topic content, and spam will lead to a ban from the bot. ‼️ We will review your submission, but suggesting a card does not guarantee it will be added to the game. 👌 It is recommended to send photos in 3:4 format (vertical rectangle), preferably with some empty space around the edges so the frame doesn't cut off the character.
suggest_q1: Question 1/3: I want to send a funny photo of my classmate, is that okay?
suggest_q2: Question 2/3: I have a really cool card. If I suggest it, will you 100% add it to the bot?
btn_q2_no: ⛔️ No, but the chance is high
suggest_q3: Question 3/3: What is the preferred aspect ratio for the photo?
suggest_fail: ❌ Incorrect answer. Please read the rules above carefully and try again.
suggest_success: 😹 Quiz passed! Send your photo (or file), card name, and desired rarity in a single message (as a caption to the media). Cost: 1000 points
suggest_err_no_caption: ⚠️ You forgot to add a caption! Please resend the photo/file and include the card name and desired rarity in the caption field.
suggest_done: ✅ Your card has been successfully sent for moderation! 1000 points deducted from your balance. Thanks for your contribution!
help_language: 🌍 Language Selection / Выбор языка Select interface language. This will change the language of all bot buttons and messages.

set_completed_msg: 🎉 ACHIEVEMENT UNLOCKED! You have collected all cards from the “%s” collection! 🪙 Reward: +%d points ✨ Go to /profile ➡️ Collections to equip this set’s Buff!

duel_result: ⚔️ BATTLE RESULTS 🗡 Player 1: %s%s └ 🃏 %s (⚔️ %d) └ 🎲 Chance: %.1f%% 🛡 Player 2: %s%s └ 🃏 %s (⚔️ %d) └ 🎲 Chance: %.1f%% %s━━━━━━━━━━━━━ 🎰 Roll: %.1f 🏆 Winner: %s (+%d 🪙)
help_sets: 📚 Collections & Buffs Cards in the game are grouped into thematic sets. Completing a full collection unlocks access to unique bonuses! 🎁 Reward: As soon as you collect all cards in a set, you will receive a large bonus in 🪙 Points. ✨ Buffs: For each completed set, you unlock a unique Buff. This is a passive boost that increases the Power of your cards in duels. ⚙️ How to use: 1. Go to /profile. 2. Press the “📚 Collections” button. 3. Select a completed set and press “✨ Equip”. ⚠️ Important: only one Buff can be active at a time!
adult_verification_msg: 🔞 Age Verification This bot contains 18+ content. Please confirm that you are at least 18 years old.
adult_rejected_msg: 🔞 Sorry, but this bot is strictly for users over 18 years old. Come back when you're older!
